Inquire

Photography for the People Who Think They're Not Photogenic

Fully guided portrait sessions for real people — no experience, no confidence required. Just show up.

Inquire Today
200+Couples Photographed
5★Average Review
8 YearsIn Business
FeaturedIn The Knot & Junebug

You hate how you look in photos.
I hear that all the time.

Most people feel awkward in front of a camera. They don't know where to look, what to do with their hands, or how to feel natural when someone is pointing a lens at them. That's not a you problem — that's a photographer problem. My job is to make you forget the camera is there.

Every session includes full posing guidance, a pre-shoot style consultation, and a relaxed pace that lets you actually enjoy the experience. You don't need to know how to pose. You just need to show up.

Meet Your Photographer

Hi, I'm [Name]

I've been photographing real people — not models, not actors — for over eight years. I started because I believed everyone deserves to feel seen and beautiful in photographs. That belief still drives every session I shoot.

My approach is guided, warm, and a little bit playful. I'll walk you through every pose, every angle, every expression. By the end of the session, most clients tell me it was nothing like what they feared.

Work With Me
Why Book With Me

Everything You Need. Nothing You Don't.

Fully Guided Sessions

No awkward silences or blank stares. I direct every pose so you always know what to do.

Style Consultation Included

Before your session, we'll talk outfits, locations, and vision so nothing is left to chance.

Same-Week Gallery Delivery

Your edited gallery arrives within 5 business days — not months.

Unlimited Print Rights

Print wherever, whenever. Your images are yours to keep forever.

Natural Light Expertise

Every session is timed and located to maximize the most flattering light for your skin tone.

100% Satisfaction Guarantee

If you're not in love with your gallery, I'll reshoot — no questions asked.

The Process

Four Steps to Photos You Love

01

Inquire

Fill out the contact form below. I'll respond within 24 hours to check your date and answer any questions.

02

Consult

We'll hop on a quick call to talk through your vision, choose a location, and plan your outfits.

03

Shoot

Show up, relax, and let me do the directing. Most sessions last 1–2 hours.

04

Receive

Your fully edited gallery arrives in your inbox within 5 business days, ready to download and print.

What's Included

Everything in Every Session

✓Pre-session style consultation
✓Full posing direction throughout
✓Location scouting & recommendations
✓1–2 hour session
✓50+ fully edited images
✓Private online gallery
✓High-resolution digital downloads
✓Unlimited personal print rights
✓5-business-day turnaround

Real People. Real Results.

Spots Are Filling Fast for Spring & Summer 2026

I take on a limited number of portrait sessions each month to ensure every client gets my full attention. Once the calendar fills, it fills. Don't wait and wonder — reach out today to hold your date.
